meta.loginDescription: Sign in or create a free Dawarly account to track job applications and get new role alerts.
meta.resetDescription: Reset your password. Enter your email to receive a verification code.

header.brandLine: Built with care for your career.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Ready to take the next step in your career?

forgot.title: Forgot Password?
forgot.description: No worries, it happens. Enter your email address and we'll send you a code to reset your password.

verify.title: Check your email
verify.description: We've sent a 6-digit verification code to {email}. Enter it below to continue.

setNew.title: Set new password
setNew.description: Your new password must be different from previously used passwords.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters long.

promo.title: Land your dream job
promo.description: Join 10,000+ professionals tracking their applications, managing interviews, and organizing their career growth.

footer.brandLine: Built with care for your career.
